ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* ID of the equipment used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the measurement */,
  "freq" INTEGER /* Frequency of the measurement */,
  "ind" INTEGER /* Index of the measurement */,
  "real" REAL /* Real component of the measurement */,
  "imag" REAL /* Imaginary component of the measurement */,
  "eta" REAL /* Damping factor associated with the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the measurement was taken */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., valid, invalid, pending review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
column_names: Date when the experiment was conducted
ID of the researcher conducting the experiment
ID of the project associated with the experiment
Location where the experiment was conducted
ID of the equipment used in the experiment
Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, cancelled)
Reference to the experiment associated with the measurement
Damping factor associated with the measurement
Temperature at which the measurement was taken
Humidity at which the measurement was taken
Status of the measurement (e.g., valid, invalid, pending review)
Contact phone number of the researcher
Unique identifier for each analysis report
Reference to the experiment associated with the report
Date when the report was generated
File path to the generated report
